'''rabadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oiliness|oiliness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oiliness|oiliness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rabadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræbædhæth|ræbædhæth]] || [[word:ræbædhæj|ræbædhæj]] || [[word:ræbædhæsh|ræbædhæsh]] || [[word:ræbædhæ|ræbædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rababadhath|rababadhath]] || [[word:rababadhaj|rababadhaj]] || [[word:rababadhash|rababadhash]] || [[word:rababadha|rababadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabadhath|rabadhath]] || [[word:rabadhaj|rabadhaj]] || [[word:rabadhash|rabadhash]] || [[word:rabadha|rabadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabafdhath|rabafdhath]] || [[word:rabafdhaj|rabafdhaj]] || [[word:rabafdhash|rabafdhash]] || [[word:rabafdhaf|rabafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rabadhatha|rabadhatha]] || [[word:rabadhaja|rabadhaja]] || [[word:rabadhasha|rabadhasha]] || [[word:rabadhaka|rabadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rabadhath|rabadhath]] || [[word:rabadhaj|rabadhaj]] || [[word:rabadhash|rabadhash]] || [[word:rabadha|rabadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rabadhathal|rabadhathal]] || [[word:rabadhajal|rabadhajal]] || [[word:rabadhashal|rabadhashal]] || [[word:rabadhakal|rabadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rabadhathatha|rabadhathatha]] || [[word:rabadhajaja|rabadhajaja]] || [[word:rabadhashasha|rabadhashasha]] || [[word:rabadhaka|rabadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rabadhathan|rabadhathan]] || [[word:rabadhajan|rabadhajan]] || [[word:rabadhashan|rabadhashan]] || [[word:rabadhakan|rabadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rabadhathaoro|rabadhathaoro]] || [[word:rabadhajaoro|rabadhajaoro]] || [[word:rabadhashaoro|rabadhashaoro]] || [[word:rabadhakaoro|rabadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
